name: @claudesk/demo-build
description: Dev-only demo-asset build harness for Claudesk (M8). Renders the real status-dot UI from a mock status timeline to a looping GIF. NOT part of the shipped Tauri bundle.

scripts.smoke: node extract-dot-css.mjs && node build.mjs --html shell.html --timeline timeline.smoke.js --out out/smoke.gif --width 1000 --height 600 --fps 15 --duration 3.2 --render-width 800 --webp
